subtitle: Digital Transformation Leader -- Technology Master Planning | SDLC Modernization | Multidisciplinary Delivery
summary_text: Technology executive with 28+ years driving digital transformation for clients and at enterprise scale -- 17 years founding and running a web/IT consulting firm, then 14 years as the first CTO at a national financial services nonprofit. Track record translating complex technical decisions into business outcomes, governing multi-year roadmaps and cross-functional delivery, and coordinating multidisciplinary teams across consultants, engineers, IT, and software development. Currently consulting on AI architecture and platform evaluation for enterprise clients. Comfortable in client-facing advisory, structured methodology design, and the practical translation between executive stakeholders and technical teams.

bullets: Designed and delivered a structured AI architecture evaluation methodology -- scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and capability taxonomy -- for a national CX consulting firm; framework adopted to streamline vendor recommendations across enterprise contact center platforms.
Provide client-facing advisory on generative and agentic AI platforms; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions for enterprise environments.

Directed enterprise-wide digital transformation driving 200%+ growth in SEO and digital acquisition; rebuilt web properties, launched multi-platform mobile applications, and embedded operational analytics across the organization.

Led full contact center / communications platform transformation with zero service disruption on day-one go-live -- multi-channel integration, AI-assisted routing and coaching, and vendor architecture across ~6 sites and hundreds of remote agents.

Owned technology master planning for an 8-year platform roadmap on MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM, directing a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development) and operating a multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive stakeholders.
Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated enterprise-wide project governance and delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence on a $30-50M annual portfolio.
Modernized SDLC through Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.

Spearheaded multi-year cloud-first transformation; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; maintained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and 50-state regulatory compliance.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) multidisciplinary technology organization spanning consulting, engineering, IT, software development, and global vendor teams -- sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions, web applications, and digital strategy for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.

Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade content management platform that frequently served as clients' first digital presence; supported dozens of content-driven sites at production scale.
Direct client engagement, scope definition, and proposal development across the full delivery lifecycle -- discovery, architecture, build, launch, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Digital Transformation, Technology Master Planning, Change Management, Cloud Modernization, Roadmap Governance
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, ePMO Governance, Multi-Stakeholder Prioritization, Scope/Schedule/Budget Management
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Cloud Migration, Enterprise Integration
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, SQL/T-SQL, Data Warehousing
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, GRC, Multi-State Regulatory Compliance
Generative AI, Agentic AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms
